list.title: Xin chao!
list.code:
# Scratch: giong nhu khoi "noi Xin chao!"
print("Xin chao!")

list.title: Hoi ten ban
list.code:
# Scratch: giong nhu khoi "hoi va doi"
ten = input("Ban ten gi? ")
print("Xin chao, " + ten + "!")

list.title: May tinh
list.code:
# Scratch: giong nhu khoi "phep +"
a = int(input("So thu nhat: "))
b = int(input("So thu hai: "))
print("Cong: " + str(a + b))
print("Tru: " + str(a - b))
print("Nhan: " + str(a * b))

list.title: Neu...thi
Loi chao khac nhau
Lap lai
Dem nguoc
list.code:
# Scratch: giong nhu khoi "thay doi" + "lap lai cho den khi"
so = 10
while so > 0:
    print(so)
    so = so - 1
print("Phong! \U0001f680")

list.title: Cai nao?
list.code:
# Scratch: giong nhu khoi "phan tu cua danh sach"
trai_cay = ["tao", "cam", "nho", "dau", "dao"]
print("Danh sach trai cay: " + str(trai_cay))
so_thu_tu = int(input("Ban muon xem cai thu may? (1-5): "))
print("Thu " + str(so_thu_tu) + " la " + trai_cay[so_thu_tu - 1] + "!")

list.title: Dem chu cai
list.code:
# Scratch: giong nhu khoi "do dai cua"
tu = input("Nhap tu yeu thich cua ban: ")
print("\"" + tu + "\" co " + str(len(tu)) + " chu cai!")
for chu in tu:
    print("-> " + chu)

list.title: Boi que
list.code:
# Scratch: giong nhu khoi "chon ngau nhien"
import random
ket_qua = random.choice(["Rat may man!", "May man!", "Kha may", "Binh thuong", "Thu lai nhe"])
print("Van may hom nay cua ban... " + ket_qua + "!")

list.title: Tro choi doan so
list.code:
# Tro choi ket hop nhieu khoi!
import random
dap_an = random.randint(1, 10)
print("Doan mot so tu 1 den 10!")

lan_thu = 0
while True:
    du_doan = int(input("Nhap mot so: "))
    lan_thu = lan_thu + 1
    if du_doan == dap_an:
        print("Dung roi! \U0001f389 Ban doan dung sau " + str(lan_thu) + " lan!")
        break
    elif du_doan < dap_an:
        print("Lon hon!")
    else:
        print("Nho hon!")
